case_title: FIRESIDE THRIFT CO. vs. MERRITT, LARRY et al

docket_entries.description: ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF FIRESIDE THRIFT CO.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MERRITT, LARRY $9,502.53 PRINCIPAL, $1,300.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $518.00 INTEREST, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $11,425.53
